calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:55 am and concluding at 9:55 am and concluding at 10:23 am.

Plaintiff Rolan Marat is present represented by Jack Bussell, Esq., placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Fuzzy Pet Health Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

ROLAN MARAT is is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Progressive Foundation, and against Defendant Fuzzy Pet Health Inc. and Fuzzy LLC., as follows:

1. Damages: $173,888.52
2. Prejudgment Interest: $13,148.83
3. Costs: $445.69
4. Attorney fees: $12,820.00
5. Penalties: $10,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $210,303.04

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Continued To Aug-06-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
